name: Booking AWS Upgrade - Revert of Revert Build Issues
description: Tracking flaky integration test failures during revert-of-revert for booking AWS SDK upgrade. Two tests fail intermittently due to thread pool exhaustion.

entries.summary: Flaky test: OutboundServiceModule test-mode executor missing CallerRunsPolicy causes RejectedExecutionException
entries.detail:
File: booking/src/main/java/com/inttra/mercury/booking/config/OutboundServiceModule.java
Line 53: outboundExecutor = environment.lifecycle().executorService(NAME).maxThreads(20).workQueue(outboundWorkQueue).build();
Should be: ...workQueue(outboundWorkQueue).rejectedExecutionHandler(new ThreadPoolExecutor.CallerRunsPolicy()).build();

Error messages:
- testUnauthorizedAmend: expected AuthorizationException with '.* is not authorized to amend this booking\.' but got RejectedExecutionException
- testUnauthorizedCancel: expected AuthorizationException with '.* is not authorized to cancel this booking\.' but got RejectedExecutionException

Model: Claude Opus 4.6

entries.summary: PR #965 merged to develop — AWS upgrade live. Revert runbook documented in booking/docs.
entries.detail:
PR #965 (Reapply ION-14382 bk3 aws upgrade) merged to develop on 2026-04-14.
Merge commit: 681e7eba1d (merges 59ebf93a2a into develop).
Local develop synced with origin/develop at HEAD 4741ad3f16 (ION-15211). Git history verified clean.

Full ION-14382 commit lifecycle:
- 74f36e7a71: Original upgrade commit on feature/ION-14382-bk3-aws-upgrade-2 (2026-02-20, 224 files, 12306 insertions)
- 7de030248f: PR #939 merge — first landing on develop (2026-04-06)
- dc4a0dde15: Revert commit on ION-14382-BK-AWS-SDK-Revert branch (2026-04-06)
- 55887494eb: PR #960 merge — revert landed same day (2026-04-06)
- 59ebf93a2a: Reapply commit, rebased on b0b50768a5 + OutboundServiceImplReferencesTest fix (2026-04-10)
- 681e7eba1d: PR #965 merge — final stable landing (2026-04-14)

booking/docs/2026-04-13-rebase-conflict-analysis.md updated with two new sections:
1. Key Commit History table (full ION-14382 lifecycle with all SHAs, dates, PRs)
2. Rollback runbook with 3 options:
   - Option A (preferred): git revert -m 1 681e7eba1d (safe, traceable)
   - Option B: git revert 59ebf93a2a (inner commit revert)
   - Option C (emergency/destructive): git reset --hard dbcc95ada8
   Plus post-revert checklist: compile, test, pom.xml cloud-sdk deps, config classes, notify downstream teams.

Model: Claude Sonnet 4.6
